project.title: Geographic Pages Engine
project.description: Generates one landing page per geographic area from a single template — used to scale local SEO across hundreds of locations.

flow.title: Template-to-Page Flow
flow.description: A user defines a page template and a set of locations; a worker fans out, generates one page per location with location-specific content, and publishes the batch.

domains.name: Generation
domains.description: Workers that materialize a page per location.

steps.title: Define Template
steps.description: User builds a template with placeholders for city, region and services.

steps.title: Pick Locations
steps.description: User selects a list of geographic areas to generate pages for.

steps.title: Generation Worker
steps.description: For each location, hydrates the template with location-specific data and saves the resulting page.

steps.title: Locations Service
steps.description: Master data source for geographic locations (name, slug, region, images).

steps.title: Page Store
steps.description: Persists each generated page with its slug, parent template and status.

steps.title: Publisher
steps.description: Pushes the batch of pages to the live CMS and flips status to published.
